videos.headline: Coleman puts Washington up with 56-yard TD run
videos.description: Tied at 21, Lavon Coleman goes untouched to the left side for 56 yards to give Washington the lead at Arizona.

videos.headline: Arizona caps opening drive with TD
videos.description: J.J. Taylor runs for 1 yd TD to complete 75 yard opening drive

videos.headline: Huskies deny Wildcats at goal line
videos.description: JJ Taylor stuffed on 4th and goal

videos.headline: Washington takes the reverse to the house
videos.description: John Ross takes the reverse and after faking the throw, no one can catch him as he goes 32 yards into the end zone to tie the game for Washington at 7-7.

videos.headline: Dawkins zooms through the defense for big play TD
videos.description: Brandon Dawkins eludes a number of Washington defenders before turning on the jets and finishing off the 79-yard run with a trip to the end zone putting Arizona back in front 14-7.

videos.headline: Huskies tie it back up after 75 yard drive
videos.description: Jake Browning pass complete to John Ross for 12 yd TD to even score at 14

videos.headline: Washington defense stepping up
videos.description: Kevin King intercepts Brandon Dawkins with diving catch

videos.headline: Huskies special teams get in on the action with forced fumble
videos.description: Darren Gardenhire forces the fumble on the punt return and is recovered by Wash Jordan Miller

videos.headline: Washington takes first lead of game
videos.description: Jake Browning runs for 3 yd TD as Washington takes 21-14 lead

videos.headline: Arizona thwarts Washington drive with interception
videos.description: Jake Browning pass intercepted by Dane Cruikshank

videos.headline: Washington forces fumble to get ball right back
videos.description: Tyrell Johnson run for 2 yds then fumbles when hit by Azeem Victor and recovered by Wash Keishawn Bierria

videos.headline: Brandon Dawkins with huge 4th Quarter run
videos.description: Brandon Dawkins breaks from pressure and runs for 56 yds

videos.headline: Dawkins TD run ties it up in the 4th
videos.description: Brandon Dawkins leaps for 2 yds TD run and ties the score at 21

videos.headline: Brandon Dawkins with miracle pass play to keep drive alive
videos.description: Brandon Dawkins breaks through sack attempt and completes pass to Shun Brown for 54 yds

videos.headline: Arizona last minute TD ties game
videos.description: Brandon Dawkins pass complete to Josh Kern for 3 yd TD to tie game

videos.headline: Washington opens up 1st OT with TD
videos.description: Jake Browning pass complete to Dante Pettis for 4 yd TD

videos.headline: Washington stops Arizona on 4th down to seal the victory
videos.description: Brandon Dawkins pass incomplete to Tyrell Johnson - Washington wins 35-28
